summary: Recording quality unknown; the show is remembered for a chaotic fence‑cutting incident rather than musical highlights.
review: Both reviewers focus on the unusual crowd situation—one describing an electrifying, quickly sold‑out concert after fans cut the fence, the other lamenting tension from ticketless attendees. No comments are made about the performance or audio fidelity, leaving the musical quality and recording characteristics unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews that discuss crowd issues but not music or sound; mixed star ratings lead to a moderate overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided in the reviews.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not mention song order or performance flow; focus was solely on audience atmosphere.
